spec_match.rationale: Properly teaches how to convert data: URL workers to Blob URL workers to ensure origin inheritance according to spec changes.

interactive.rationale: Features multiple click-to-load examples, an active editor that converts input text in real-time, copy triggers, and a live test framework that spins up workers and logs outputs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent blurb, providing an active converter with warnings for storage APIs.

edge_cases.rationale: Correctly analyzes script content to raise distinct warnings when BroadcastChannel, localStorage, or indexedDB are used.

references.rationale: The 'see also' block lacks the mandated chromestatus.com/feature/6290352295247872 link.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to style guides by employing standard layout rows, code textareas, custom emerald text highlighting in dark logs, and clear button tokens.

openQuestions.title: Link the ChromeStatus tracking entry
openQuestions.detail: Add the missing ChromeStatus tracking link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/6290352295247872) to the 'see also' section to align with showcase guidelines.
